events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Luna Tide whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Ora Flame asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Nova Sol dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Nova Sol notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Echo Vale whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
